WITN08630100
WITN08630100

51. I do not recall whether there was a particular approach applied to cases where a shortfall was identified on audit.

52. I do not recall in what circumstances steps to restrain a suspect's assets by criminal enforcement methods such as confiscation proceedings were considered.

53. I have been asked who decided whether criminal enforcement proceedings should be pursued and what factors did they consider when making decisions around this. I do not recall who decided this.

Training, instructions and guidance to investigators within the Security team

54. I have been asked to consider Appendix 2 of POL00104825 and POL00104805 and to set out what training, qualifications and / or experience were required for an investigator within the Security team to be able to conduct investigations where a SPM / SPM's assistant / Crown Office employee was suspected of a criminal offence and whether the requirements change over the period I worked within the Security team. I do not recall this information.

55. I do not recall what instructions, guidance and / or training were given to investigators within the Security team about interviewing a SPM / SPM's assistant / Crown Office employee who was suspected of a criminal offence.

56. I do not recall whether any of the following documents were provided to investigators within the Security team.

Page 13 of 22
